description_long: This is a single children's ballet flat shoe with a rounded toe and a soft, matte brown exterior. The shoe features a delicate pink bow on the front and a matching pink trim along the opening, as well as a thin pink strap across the instep for added security. The interior lining is a light pink fabric, providing a gentle contrast to the darker outer material. The sole is flat and appears to be made of a light beige or cream-colored material, likely rubber or synthetic for flexibility and comfort. The stitching is visible along the back seam, indicating a well-constructed design. The overall appearance is clean, simple, and suitable for casual or semi-formal urban wear.
description: A children's ballet flat shoe with a brown matte exterior, pink bow and trim, and a flat beige sole. Features a pink strap across the instep and a soft pink interior lining.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, pink bow, and pink strap across the instep.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the flat beige sole, pink trim, and the full length of the pink strap.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the vertical stitching along the back seam and the opening of the shoe.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the continuous brown exterior, pink trim, and the flat sole.
attribute_lacing_style: slip-on with decorative bow and instep strap
